productDisplayName: Scullers Men Maroon & Navy Blue Shirt
description: Style Note This classic shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with jeans and casual footwear. Product Details Navy blue, maroon and white checked shirt, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, brand tag stitched on the pocket and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 42
